---
title: "Wedding Itinerary"
from: markdown+emoji
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}

## Page under construction

:::

![The venue - our front yard](DSC03105.JPEG){width="100%"}

### 02:30PM
Arrive at venue.

23 Kererū Street, Two Mile Bay, Taupō

---

### 04:00PM
Ceremony

![](pikorua2.png){style="border-radius: 30px;" width=10% fig-align="left"}

---

### \~05:00PM 
After ceremony Drinks and nibbles at our house

---

### 07:00PM
Travel to Reception
Hosted at XXX

---

### 10:00PM

---

### late
idk, usually gets loose at this point
